body: #48 ambient life assets generated and integrated. 3 categories x 3 variants each (9 sprites total): amb-rock-0/1/2, amb-debris-0/1/2, amb-bush-0/1/2. Spawning on floor surfaces at 6% probability with random scale/rotation/opacity. Rock pile frames 28/44/60 selected, debris frames 0/28/56, bush frames 1/28/60 as per your QA picks.
